_comment_jwt: LOCAL DEV ONLY. The Jwt:Key below is a development placeholder so the API starts on your machine. NEVER deploy this file to production or commit a real signing key. For production, set the Jwt__Key environment variable (Render does this automatically via render.yaml).
_comment_cloudinary: LOCAL DEV ONLY. Cloudinary credentials are duplicated here from Frontend/souce/.env so the backend can sign uploads. For production, set the Cloudinary__* environment variables in Render.
